hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "git\s+(add|commit|push)" && echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "(\.env|credentials|secret|password|api.?key|token|private.?key)"; then echo "BLOCK: Potential secret in git operation. Review staged files for sensitive data."; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
